summary: Fix calendar meeting reminders so 2-minute alerts fire reliably.

changed: Meeting reminder watchdog polls every 30 seconds so the in-app popup does not miss the 2-minute window
Calendar sync refreshes scheduled system notifications every 60 seconds between full syncs
fixed: Calendar meeting reminders no longer skipped when sync runs within 2 minutes of start
Imminent meetings (under 2 minutes away) still alert within a few seconds
Meeting reminders reschedule when calendar events reload from iCloud
System notification scheduling checks macOS permission and logs failures instead of failing silently
